question: Will Nickel price on the London Metal Exchange exceed 8500 USD/tonne on May 31, 2026?
reason: Nickel prices have been consistently above $18,500 per tonne, indicating a low likelihood of dropping below $8,500 by May 31, 2026.
evidence: As of May 22, 2026, the LME 3-month nickel price was $18,880 per tonne. ([tacto.ai](https://www.tacto.ai/en-us/commodities/nickel-price?utm_source=openai))

Goldman Sachs raised its 2026 average nickel price forecast to $18,500 per tonne, citing tighter Indonesian supply. ([sahmcapital.com](https://www.sahmcapital.com/news/content/update-1-goldman-sachs-lifts-2026-nickel-outlook-on-tighter-indonesian-supply-2026-05-11?utm_source=openai))
